items.title: The Yummy Fur Announce First New Album In 28 Years Everybody Talks About The Weather
items.summary: Glasgow indie rockers the Yummy Fur were a going concern for most of the '90s, but they called it quits in 1999, the same year keyboardist Mark Gibbons died by suicide. Two members of the band, Alex Kapranos and Paul Thomson, went on to co-found Franz Ferdinand, which added Yummy Fur guitarist Dino Bardot many years later.

items.title: Djrum Announces New EP I Wander: Hear “I Wander (IV + V)”
items.summary: Djrum's elegantly introspective Under Tangled Silence was one of the best electronic albums of last year. He's following it up next month with I Wander, a new EP designed as one standalone piece of music but also divided into six tracks. The post Djrum Announces New EP <em>I Wander</em>: Hear “I Wander (IV + V)” appeared first on Stereogum.

items.title: Don’t Put In The Newspaper That Pharrell Got Frustrated
items.summary: The Invite, the new tense dinner party comedy directed by Olivia Wilde based on a script by Will McCormack and Rashida Jones, was a Sundance hit and has been earning rave reviews. We mentioned it before because Dev Hynes composed the score, and now there's another music angle. The post Don’t Put In The Newspaper That Pharrell Got Frustrated appeared first on Stereogum.
